---
description: Post a completed code review directly to a GitHub Pull Request using inline comments.
---

# Post PR Review Workflow

**Purpose**: To take the actionable feedback generated by `code_review.md` and post it directly to the relevant lines in a GitHub Pull Request.

**INSTRUCTIONS**: If the user specifically requests to post the review to the GitHub PR directly and has the GitHub CLI (`gh`) authenticated, run this workflow using the `gh api` to post inline comments pointing directly to the specific lines of code.

### 1. Retrieve the Latest Commit ID

```bash
COMMIT_ID=$(gh pr view <PR_NUMBER> --json commits --jq '.commits[-1].oid')
```

### 2. Post Inline Comments

For each actionable item from the code review, identify the exact file path and line number, then submit a POST request to the GitHub REST API:

```bash
gh api \
  --method POST \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/<PR_NUMBER>/comments \
  -f body="**[Severity]**: [Your detailed comment/suggestion here]" \
  -f commit_id="$COMMIT_ID" \
  -f path="[path/to/modified/file.js]" \
  -F line=[line_number] \
  -f side="RIGHT"
```

_(Note: Using `/repos/{owner}/{repo}` triggers a magical `gh` macro that determines the repo name automatically based on the current directory!)._
